analysis: Pipeline Bottleneck Model — Fleet Beta Squad 9

bottlenecks.reason: Extremely long runtimes (avg 64min, max 118min) with 60% failure rate. Observed hanging at offset 35000 during batch processing of 36497 records. Sequential batch processing with 1000-record batches causes timeout.
bottlenecks.optimization: Implement parallel batch processing, add checkpoint/resume for interrupted runs, reduce batch size or add early termination on timeout. Consider pre-filtering leads before expensive processing.

bottlenecks.reason: 100% failure rate with avg 15min runtime. Pipeline completes but fails at result submission. Both runs exceeded 15 minutes.
bottlenecks.optimization: Debug result submission step. Add timeout with graceful degradation. Consider splitting into sub-stages with independent success tracking.

bottlenecks.reason: Reliable (0% failure) but moderately slow at ~5min avg. Processes 15+ contacts with multi-touch sequences including SMS and email.
bottlenecks.optimization: Batch API calls for skip trace and email sends. Currently appears sequential.

bottlenecks.reason: High failure rate (67%) uploading 81 properties. Failures likely from API timeouts or data validation issues.
bottlenecks.optimization: Add retry logic with exponential backoff. Validate property data before upload attempt.

bottlenecks.stage: Daily Lead CSV for PropStream Skip Trace
bottlenecks.reason: Reliable but includes gateway timeout for Telegram message delivery (30s wasted). Core CSV generation is fast.
bottlenecks.optimization: Send Telegram notification asynchronously to avoid blocking the pipeline.

bottlenecks.reason: Fast and reliable. This is the lightweight lead discovery step.
Reliable but slow (~7min avg). Content generation with LLM calls dominates runtime.
bottlenecks.optimization: Cache common content templates. Pre-generate content during off-peak circadian phases.

bottlenecks.reason: High failure rate (60%) with variable duration (2.5min avg, 6.5min max). Pipeline status analysis takes too long when data sources are degraded.
bottlenecks.optimization: Add fast-fail on degraded dependencies. Cache previous pipeline status for comparison.

bottlenecks.reason: 80% failure rate despite photo screening 643 properties. Failures in email delivery (webhook server issues). When it works, sends 3 qualifying properties.
bottlenecks.optimization: Fix email delivery pipeline. Add retry for webhook failures. Separate property screening from email sending.

bottlenecks.reason: Script reported as MISSING in status report. Moderate reliability issue.
bottlenecks.optimization: Verify script exists at expected path. Add pre-flight check before cron execution.

bottlenecks.reason: Fast and reliable. Scans 1060 markets, detects 165 edges in ~8s. Best-performing pipeline stage.
Reports SYSTEM FAILURE status frequently but completes reliably. Gateway timeout on job execution (30s) inflates duration.
bottlenecks.optimization: Reduce Telegram gateway timeout. Consider async notification.

dscr.critical_path: Daily DSCR Lead Generation (3837s avg) -> Outreach (297s avg) -> Skip Trace CSV (168s avg) -> Lead Pipeline (90s avg)
dscr.notes: The lead generation stage dominates at 81% of total pipeline time. Fixing this alone would reduce pipeline time by ~60min.

trading.bottleneck_stage: Daily Cash-Flowing Deals Email (80% failure rate)
trading.notes: Duration is acceptable but failure rates are very high. Email delivery is the weakest link.

monitoring.bottleneck_stage: None — both stages are fast and reliable
monitoring.notes: Well-optimized pipeline. Geopolitical scanner is especially efficient.

content.critical_path: Instagram Reels (104s) -> LinkedIn (115s) -> Twitter DSCR (94s) -> Parse.bot (127s)
content.notes: Content pipeline is distributed across platforms with no single bottleneck.

top_optimizations.impact: Reduce 64min avg to <10min, eliminate 60% failure rate
top_optimizations.action: Implement parallel batch processing with checkpoint/resume. Current sequential offset-based batching of 36K+ records causes timeouts. Add early termination and progress persistence.

top_optimizations.impact: Fix 80% failure rate, restore daily revenue-generating emails
top_optimizations.action: Fix webhook server startup and email delivery. Separate property screening (works) from email sending (fails). Add retry logic.

top_optimizations.impact: Fix 60% failure rate in trading monitoring
top_optimizations.action: Add fast-fail when upstream data sources are degraded instead of spending 6+ minutes discovering failures.

top_optimizations.impact: Fix 100% failure rate in high-value lead pipeline
top_optimizations.action: Debug result submission step. Pipeline processes successfully but fails to persist/report results.

top_optimizations.impact: Save 30s per affected job (multiple jobs), improve apparent reliability
top_optimizations.action: Send Telegram notifications asynchronously (fire-and-forget with separate retry queue) instead of blocking pipeline execution.
